description: Command value objects for the agent loop — kind constants, pending queue items, and routed commands with core/extension/rejected discrimination.

files.responsibility: Constants for core command kinds: steer, follow_up, cancel, human_response, continue. With isCore() check.
Pending command in queue — runId, kind, idempotencyKey, payload, options.
Routed command with status discrimination — core(), extension(), rejected() factory methods.
